tidal-wave::created_object_or_structure.issue: Actionable open: Created structures, wards, huts, mounts, or servants need durable object/entity fields.
tidal-wave::created_object_or_structure.recommendedJsonChange: Use current summon/utility/terrain data as interim representation.

tidal-wave::resource_or_consumption.issue: Actionable open: Costs, spell storage, triggers, or resources need non-component resource fields.
tidal-wave::resource_or_consumption.recommendedJsonChange: Use current component/utility fields as interim data.

tidal-wave::status_or_state_change.issue: Closed residual duplicate: a manual review row already resolved this finding as represented, wrong-bucket, or tracked under a more specific open bucket. No mechanic is being discarded by closing this generic residual row.
tidal-wave::status_or_state_change.recommendedTemplateChange: No template change required from this residual duplicate.
tidal-wave::status_or_state_change.recommendedJsonChange: No JSON change required from this residual duplicate.

tidal-wave::environmental_change.issue: Actionable open: Environmental changes need reusable world-state fields for weather, obscurement, growth, gas, liquids, and hazards.
tidal-wave::environmental_change.recommendedJsonChange: Use current terrain/damage/utility fields as interim data.

tiny-servant::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: Closed: Reviewed in the level-3 residual sweep; attack_or_save_modifier is already covered by current save, attack, target, filter, or prompt fields where this row applies.
tiny-servant::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: No new template field required from this residual row.
tiny-servant::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedJsonChange: No JSON change required from this residual row.

tiny-servant::sustain_or_recast_action.issue: Actionable open: Repeat actions, recasts, and sustain behavior need stronger action-economy fields.
tiny-servant::sustain_or_recast_action.recommendedJsonChange: Use Utility Options/grantedActions as interim representation.

tiny-servant::terrain_or_surface.issue: Actionable open: Terrain/surface rules need stronger terrain, surface, passability, and environmental-state fields when not already covered by TERRAIN.
tiny-servant::terrain_or_surface.recommendedJsonChange: Use current terrain/utility representation as interim data.

tiny-servant::vision_light_sound.issue: Closed residual duplicate: a manual review row already resolved this finding as represented, wrong-bucket, or tracked under a more specific open bucket. No mechanic is being discarded by closing this generic residual row.
tiny-servant::vision_light_sound.recommendedTemplateChange: No template change required from this residual duplicate.
tiny-servant::vision_light_sound.recommendedJsonChange: No JSON change required from this residual duplicate.

tiny-servant::summon_or_controlled_entit.issue: Actionable open: Summoned/controlled entities need command, initiative, stat, duration, and ownership fields.
tiny-servant::summon_or_controlled_entit.recommendedJsonChange: Use existing SUMMONING/Utility Options as interim data.

tiny-servant::object_stats_or_damageabil.issue: Actionable open: Object stats, structure durability, or object transformations need explicit AC/HP/passability/damageability fields.
tiny-servant::object_stats_or_damageabil.recommendedJsonChange: Use current spatial/utility fields until propagation.

tiny-servant::conditional_ending.issue: Actionable open: Some ending conditions are represented in prose/options but need reusable break-condition fields.
tiny-servant::conditional_ending.recommendedJsonChange: Use existing duration/utility/status break fields as interim data.
tiny-servant::conditional_ending.closedReason: Closed by the detailed Tiny Servant conditional-ending row: the servant's 0-HP ending is represented with created_entity_drops_to_0_hp in structured markdown and runtime conditionalEndings.
